---
title: "correlations"
output: html_document
---

[Back to MainReportHW3.html](MainReportHW4.html#correlations)

# import data

```{r}
hoteldata <- readRDS("hoteldata_og.rds")
```


# correlation matrix

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(corrplot)

# 1) Keep only numeric columns
num_data <- hoteldata %>%
  select(where(is.numeric))

# 2) Correlation matrix
cor_matrix <- cor(num_data, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

# 3) View it
print(cor_matrix)

# 4) Visualize it
corrplot(cor_matrix,
         method = "color",
         type = "upper",
         order = "hclust",
         tl.cex = 0.7,
         addCoef.col = "black",
         number.cex = 0.6)
```
```{r}

library(magick)

img <- image_read("correlationplot.png")
plot(img)

```


[Back to MainReportHW3.html](MainReportHW4.html#correlations)
